zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Lawson於1430年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德白維爾時，他的父親William Lawson30歲，母親Agnes Cramlington23歲。他於1460年8月31日與Isabella Killinghall在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德白維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1489年7月2日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Lawson于1430年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德白維爾时，他的父亲William Lawson30岁，母亲Agnes Cramlington23岁。他于1460年8月31日与Isabella Killinghall在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德白維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1489年7月2日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德可拉苗林頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic ‘son of Lawrence’; see   Law   1. It is also found in Ireland since the 17th century.
Americanized form of Swedish   Larsson   and Danish, Norwegian or North German   Larsen  .

variants.name: Law
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from a Middle English personal name Law(e), a short form of Lawrence .

Scottish and northern English: topographic name for someone who lived near a hill, northern Middle English law (from Old English hlāw, which generally became low in the south and law in the north). Compare Lowe and Lew .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 羅, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Luo   1.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Lawson was born in 1430, in Bywell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Lawson, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Cramlington, was 23. He married Isabella Killinghall on 31 August 1460, in Bywell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 2 July 1489, in Cramlington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Lawson est né en 1430, à Bywell, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Lawson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cramlington, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Killinghall le 31 août 1460, à Bywell, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1489, à Cramlington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Lawson 1430 in Bywell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Lawson 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Cramlington 23. Er hat am 31. August 1460 in Bywell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Isabella Killinghall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 2. Juli 1489 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cramlington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Lawson è nato il nel 1430 nel Bywell, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Lawson, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Cramlington, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Killinghall il 31 agosto 1460, nel Bywell, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 2 luglio 1489, nel Cramlington, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Lawsonが1430年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブイウエルで生まれた時，父William Lawsonは30歳，母Agnes Cramlingtonは23歳であった。1460年8月31日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブイウエルでIsabella Killinghallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1489年7月2日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドクラムリントンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Lawson(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 비웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Lawson(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Cramlington(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1460년 8월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 비웰에서 Isabella Killinghall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1489년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 크램링턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Lawson родился в 1430 г. в местности бивелл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Lawson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Cramlington, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Killinghall 31 августа 1460 г. в местности бивелл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 2 июля 1489 г. в местности крамлингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Lawson nació en 1430, en Bywell, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Lawson, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Cramlington, tenía 23 años.
